author_identification.canonical_name_ar: محمد بن محمد محمود بن محمد المصطفى بن ديَّ اليعقوبي الأعمامي
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Scholar in the field of Usul al-Fiqh, known for his commentary on the Manzumat al-Marahi.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A commentary on a well-known work in Usul al-Fiqh, contributing to the understanding and dissemination of the science.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Part of the scholarly tradition of commenting on and expanding upon foundational texts in Usul al-Fiqh.
